roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PROBABLE CAUESE HEARING/X: APD PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE IS PRESENT,/X: THIS RESOLUTION IS AS TO THE PAROLE VIOLATION ONLY,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/DEF: ADMITS VIOLATION NO, 1/3000REIN/PAJ: 100/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 18 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE  AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:  PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS VIOLATION NO, 2 IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE IS GRANTED
